event: Scene from the story of the greatest nations
description: A black-and-white engraving depicting a classical scene. In the foreground, a figure reclines on a low stone platform or bed, draped in white cloth. Above and behind, several figures in classical robes stand or lean near a stone wall and tree, appearing to observe or converse. One figure holds what appears to be a birdcage. The setting suggests an ancient garden or courtyard with foliage and architectural elements. The engraving style uses fine crosshatching for tonal detail.

_meta.title: The story of the greatest nations
